name: linta
description: Use Codex to maintain Linta Markdown knowledge bases with source-backed, deterministic workflows.

interface.longDescription: Linta gives Codex a deterministic workflow for creating, ingesting, linting, indexing, and exporting Markdown knowledge bases without mutating raw source files or committing private deployment values.
defaultPrompt: Check this Linta knowledge base and fix maintenance issues.
Ingest this source into my Linta wiki.
Export current Linta context for another AI tool.
